title: Check list as a Template in update
excerpt:
PCan a check list be make as a template within the update. 
 
We have a list of items that need to be checked off before the project can move to the next group in that board. 
Best practice for this

posts.author: Sales816Solar (On'Rea Knox-Lewis)
